ddls:
CREATE TABLE "design_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the design component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the design component (e.g., module, IP core) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the component */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design interface */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the design interface */,
  "interface_type" TEXT /* Type of the design interface (e.g., AXI4-Stream, AXI4-Lite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design interface */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the interface */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the interface */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interface */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interface was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the interface */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interface was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design configuration */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design component */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design interface */,
  "bit_range" TEXT /* Bit range or address of the design component */,
  "fpga_pin" TEXT /* FPGA pin number of the design component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_configurations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES design_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_configurations_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES design_interfaces ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design revision */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design component */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the design revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design revision */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the revision */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_revisions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES design_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_processes" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design component */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "test_bench" TEXT /* Name of the test bench used */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing tool used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_processes_test_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_tool_id") REFERENCES testing_tools ("test_tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_processes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES design_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_processes" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design component */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation */,
  "validation_bench" TEXT /* Name of the validation bench used */,
  "validation_environment" TEXT /* Description of the validation environment */,
  "validation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the validation */,
  "validation_tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation tool used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the validation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the validation was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the validation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the validation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_processes_validation_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_tool_id") REFERENCES testing_tools ("test_tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_processes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES design_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, developer, tester) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the project manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project manager account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project manager account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the design tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the design tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tool was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tool was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_tools" (
  "test_tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing tool */,
  "test_tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tool was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tool was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file import */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the imported file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the file import */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who imported the file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the import */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was imported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file import status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file export */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the exported file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the exported file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date of the file export */,
  "exported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was exported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the file export status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_exports_exported_by FOREIGN KEY ("exported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
